title: ophrys × rasettii
intro: Ophrys × rasettii, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Ophrys genus. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × rasettii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ophrys × rasettii are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
